description: V3-07(S8) allow-list consumed by scripts/v3/hardcoded-text-scan.mjs. Entries here are EXCLUDED from the GAP count + CI-strict-mode regression check. Keep additions justified — a comment alongside each entry shows why it's safe (brand idioms, dev-only labels, vendor-mandated text, etc.). Owner-reserved paths are hard-coded in the scanner, not in this file.
strings: Reference this exact amount and your project name when you send proof of payment.
Reference this exact amount and your record name when you send proof of payment.
Reference your record name on the transfer.
Founder identity and payout proof are required before we can complete your verification review.
Your uploaded documents are stored securely and used only to verify your store during review.
Or jump to a top route

notes.strings: Day + month tokens that resolve via Intl on the surface but appear as fallback literals in non-localised utility files. '= 1024 && unit' is a scanner false positive on packages/messaging-thread/src/thread.tsx:51 — the formatBytes JS `value >= 1024 && unit < units.length - 1` loop condition parsed as JSX text. 'Realtime updates are live' is a screen-reader aria-label on the messaging-thread Live pill — deferred to V3-07b operator-surface i18n pass. 'Loading content.' is a screen-reader-only a11y label in apps/property/app/account/loading.tsx — deferred to V3-07b for systematic sr-only string handling. 'Henry & Co.' and 'HENRY & CO.' are fixed brand wordmarks; the payment proof helper and 'Copy amount' are existing payment-surface literals whose line numbers moved during the V3-LEGAL-RENAME-01 config import pass and are not new copy. '): Promise' is the same TS-type-annotation false-positive class as the '(r.ok ? (r.json() as Promise' entry: the `>([^<>{}]{2,})<` JSX-text regex captures the `): Promise` between the `>` of `Record<string, unknown>` and the `<` of `Promise<void>` in async telemetry helpers (apps/account/components/smart-home/DashboardRefreshTracker.tsx + EmptyStateCtaTracker.tsx) — never user-facing copy. 'Clear search' / 'Filter results by division' / 'Search results' are sr-only a11y labels (aria-label / visually-hidden <label>), and 'Focus search' / 'Move between results' / 'Open the highlighted route' / 'Or jump to a top route' are keyboard-cheatsheet + jump-list helper strings in the rebuilt hub /search (apps/hub/app/(site)/search/HubSearchExperience.tsx) — same class as the existing 'Keyboard shortcuts' / 'Close workspace menu' a11y labels, deferred to the hub i18n wave that will own the whole public /search surface.
notes.filePrefixes: super-app + company-hub are Expo (React Native) apps with their own i18n stack and should not be lumped into the Next.js JSX scan. scripts/ and tools/ are not walked at all — see SCAN_ROOTS in hardcoded-text-scan.mjs. apps/hub/app/(dev) is the dev-only engine gallery (hard 404 in production via NODE_ENV guard) — dev harness labels, never user-facing. apps/studio-sites (SA-2) is the multi-tenant renderer that serves CLIENT-OWNED generated site content by host — its page copy is whatever the client's bundle says (any language), and its only Henry-authored strings are a preview banner + a private-preview notice; it is not part of the Henry Onyx localized product chrome, so it is excluded like the other non-product-UI surfaces.
